title: ResumeBuddy JobProfile
description: Structured representation of a job posting for analysis and resume targeting (v1). Populated from pasted text and LLM analysis in later pipeline stages.

schemaVersion.description: JobProfile schema revision. Bump only for breaking structural changes.

title.description: Role title as stated or inferred from the posting.

company.description: Employer or team name when available.

level.description: Seniority or level line if present (e.g. Senior, L5).

location.description: Work location or arrangement when stated.

responsibilities.description: Responsibilities and duties derived from the posting.

skills.description: Skills relevant to the role; ordering reflects LLM output (no separate importance rank in v1).

tools.description: Tools, platforms, or technologies named in the posting.

keywords.description: Salient keywords and phrases for targeting.

jobRequirementLevel.description: LLM interpretation of how the posting frames the criterion—not from a separate rules engine.

requirementLevel.description: When the posting implies required vs nice-to-have, encoded here as LLM interpretation.
